$comment: Conceptual layer model for a single-file vanilla-CSS site. A file-boundary import check (workflow §7.2) has no target here — there is one stylesheet, not a component import graph — so it is documented, not enforced (docs/adr/0006-css-adaptations.md). The enforced equivalents are the no-raw-values gate (§7.1) and Style Dictionary's semantic-only emit (primitives never reach the component layer).

tokens.rule: primitive + semantic tiers; only semantic is emitted to CSS

base.rule: element/base rules (html, body, a, h1-h6, p, lists, tables, code) — reference semantic tokens

patterns.rule: section/layout rules (.hero-home, .approach-section, .technical-foundation, grids) — compose components + tokens

pages.rule: HTML wiring real content with pattern/component classes — no inline styles
